channel.title: Changelog Feed
channel.description: Changes for each version of the software.

item.title: Version 1.108.51 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.108.51

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPage: Cache scrollbar width to avoid excessive style recalculations
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: DemoKit: Hardened script loading in internal bootstrap processes for Card Explorer and Accessibility Guide applications
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Text: Skip unstable test in Chrome
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where navigating back from an analytical list page resulted in an unexpected error when the state of the browser history was undefined
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where attachments could not be opened in readOnly mode by including the __metadata.media_src property in the conditions for the media source
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved multiple issues with variant management and application state handling
  • Library: sap.ui.commons
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.commons.Tree: fix unstable test
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueListProvider: do not filter out suggestions returned from service
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.core: Harden script loading in internal bootstrap scripts
  • Library: sap.ui.export
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.export: Add XSRF token support for Read Access Logging
  • Library: sap.ui.integration
    • Type: FIX, Description: DemoKit: Hardened script loading in internal bootstrap processes for Card Explorer and Accessibility Guide applications
  • Library: sap.ui.ux3
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.ux3.ThingInspector: stabilize tests

item.title: Version 1.108.38 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.108.38

  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that custom columns that contain numbers are correctly exported
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now set the correct state for the Selected property on the UploadSetItem
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Image: Inline svg rendering issue corrected
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed the truncation of timestamp issue in the feedListItem
  • Library: sap.tnt
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.tnt.SideNavigation: Add tooltip to the up and down arrow buttons
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: ControlProvider: V4 value list annotation is now prioritized over V2
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueListProvider: The correct filter field description is now applied when multiple validation requests are submitted

item.title: Version 1.108.49 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.108.49

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Press event is fired correctly on pressing SPACE
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterPanel: Single DynamicDateRange fields do not add default values
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueListProvider: Correct firing of 'change' event when single text field is used with no description
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.base.strings.formatMessage: Accept nullish arguments
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.CalendarDateInterval: shows correct year
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.Calendar: fix unstable test
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Press event is fired correctly on pressing SPACE

item.title: Version 1.108.52 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.108.52

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.TimePickerClock: Replace inline drag event attributes with addEventListener
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBox: adjust failing tests in FF
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.FormattedText: adjust placeholder rendering
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed the scroll arrow buttons not working when a single item is larger than the HeaderContainer
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: The stability of navigateBasedOnStartupParameters when being called multiple times is now improved
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the current object page context is always passed as a parameter while fetching the Related Apps
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.microchart
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now changed the minimum interactive area of interactive microcharts from 48px to 44px.
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: valuehelp.MDCTable: Fix range selection

item.title: Version 1.108.54 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.108.54

  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where loading a saved variant and restoring extension filter values overwrote the saved variant

item.title: Version 1.120.35 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.120.35

  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the Discard Draft popover is shown correctly when the browser window is resized to a smaller size
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that custom columns that contain numbers are correctly exported
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the Discard Draft popover is shown correctly when the browser window is resized to a smaller size
  • Library: sap.fe.templates
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the Discard Draft popover is shown correctly when the browser window is resized to a smaller size
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed the SAP gateway issues for PDFViewer
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: has correct css parameters for active Emphasized
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: The correct ARIA label is now assigned to Object page header forms
    • Type: FIX, Description: We’ve removed incorrect ARIA labels that were assigned to the footer of an object page
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpDialog: remove default sorting on mobile
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpProvider: Validate filters on initial data fetch
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/core/format/NumberFormat.js: support rounding of numbers given as string
    • Type: FIX, Description: routing/History: avoid creating history entry when same hash is applied
  • Library: sap.ui.layout
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.layout.PaneContainer: fix invalidation of nested panes

item.title: Version 1.120.45 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.120.45

  • Library: sap.gantt
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now updated the appropriate error message when gantt chart exceeds maximum printable size
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: DemoKit: Hardened script loading in internal bootstrap processes for Card Explorer and Accessibility Guide applications
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Text: Skip unstable test in Chrome
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where Save and Next buttons were not working on object pages in direct edit mode
  • Library: sap.ui.commons
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.commons.Tree: fix unstable test
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.core: Harden script loading in internal bootstrap scripts
  • Library: sap.ui.export
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.export: Add XSRF token support for Read Access Logging
  • Library: sap.ui.integration
    • Type: FIX, Description: DemoKit: Hardened script loading in internal bootstrap processes for Card Explorer and Accessibility Guide applications
  • Library: sap.ui.richtexteditor
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.richtexteditor.RichTextEditor: aria-readonly attribute is not added to the RTE container element when the editor is in read-only mode
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DateRangeSelection: selection via keyboard is working

item.title: Version 1.120.42 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.120.42

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiComboBox: After deletion next focused token is announced with correct position
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Press event is fired correctly on pressing SPACE
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StepInput: format value when the front number is removed (e.g .50 -> 0.50) also, allow start typing a number with the decimal separator
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: For the object page in the inline rows creation scenario, the DefaultValuesFunction is invoked after the smart table gets the binding context
    • Type: FIX, Description: You can now remove action buttons from object page subsections in key user adaptation
    • Type: FIX, Description: Missing behavior files no longer cause an HTTP status code 404 (Not Found) error when loading canvas pages
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.microchart
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've fixed an issue where the bar labels within the stacked bar micro chart disappears after navigating back to the main screen due to reduction in chart height
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: Field: runtime error if DOM removed while update
    • Type: FIX, Description: MultiValueField: duplicate values not recognized
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.mdc.Table: Ensure rebind before render on change appliance
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.Calendar: fix unstable test
  • Library: sap.ui.ux3
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.ux3.ThingInspector: Stabilize tests
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Button: Press event is fired correctly on pressing SPACE

item.title: Version 1.120.43 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.120.43

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Avatar: prevent event bubbling when LightBox is present
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: The draft activation confirmation popup is no longer displayed when the navigation from an object page opens a new browser window or tab
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: Focus is stolen from the first focusable element on the page
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: Skip onfocusin filtering after suggestion item selection for MultiComboBox
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartTable: DateRangeType Issues with Timezones
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: missing token descriptions when setUiState is called after associateValueLists
    • Type: FIX, Description: personalization/Controller: Store normalized data in alreadyKnownRuntimeData
    • Type: FIX, Description: P13nConditionPanel: Fixed issue with fiscal formatting
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.base.strings.formatMessage: Accept nullish arguments
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.CalendarDateInterval: shows correct year

item.title: Version 1.120.46 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.120.46

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed the scroll arrow buttons not working when a single item is larger than the HeaderContainer
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed the issue of truncating characters in the GenericTile header section by removing the usage of sap.m.Text deprecated method
    • Type: FIX, Description: m.Table: avoid scroll jump when focus is forwarded on mouse click
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: We’ve improved the loading speed of the list report page when a record is edited directly from an object page
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.microchart
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now changed the minimum interactive area of interactive microcharts from 48px to 44px
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: p13n.ChartItemPanel: fix acc issues
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelp: typeahed used value not mapping
  • Library: sap.ui.table
    • Type: FIX, Description: ui.Table: Removed column header associations and count information on cell level

item.title: Version 1.120.44 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.120.44

  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the current object page context is always passed as a parameter while fetching the Related Apps
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved multiple issues with variant management and application state handling
  • Library: sap.ui.generic.app
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the internal variable state is restored after the getDefaultValues call

item.title: Version 1.136.18 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.136.18

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.GridListItem: Missing shadow on selected state added
  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: You can now set menu items defined using DataActionForGroup to be navigable
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: You can now set menu items defined using DataActionForGroup to be navigable
    • Type: FIX, Description: Undefined values in the value help table are now shown as empty cells
  • Library: sap.gantt
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now provided a fix for the missing rows and garbled icons in a single-page PDF printing of gantt chart
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.TimePickerClock: Replace inline drag event attributes with addEventListener
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBox: adjust failing tests in FF
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed the scroll arrow buttons not working when a single item is larger than the HeaderContainer
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DynamicDateRange: align height to content
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: We’ve improved the loading speed of the list report page when a record is edited directly from an object page
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.microchart
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now changed the minimum interactive area of interactive microcharts from 48px to 44px
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelp: Tokenizer shows empty Token
    • Type: FIX, Description: p13n.ChartItemPanel: fix acc issues

item.title: Version 1.136.14 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.136.14

  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that custom columns that contain numbers are correctly exported
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now correctly manage the function import in the invokeAction method
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where referenced IDs in custom columns were not passed correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where multiple dropdown rows were created because of too many data requests
    • Type: FIX, Description: We have resolved an issue where horizontal scrollbars did not render correctly in tables after exiting full-screen mode
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Avatar: prevent event bubbling when LightBox is present
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed a jump issue in the header container by using an outline instead of a border
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed an issue in slide tile where the tile indicator buttons were not visible
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.OverflowToolbar: onfocusfail no longer throws an error
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: Skip onfocusin filtering after suggestion item selection for MultiComboBox
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: missing token descriptions when setUiState is called after associateValueLists
    • Type: FIX, Description: personalization/Controller: Store normalized data in alreadyKnownRuntimeData
    • Type: FIX, Description: P13nConditionPanel: Fixed issue with fiscal formatting
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpDialog: Numeric keys are no longer parsed
    • Type: FIX, Description: DateRangeType: Correct filtering from saved variant in P13n dialog
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.base.strings.formatMessage: Accept nullish arguments
  • Library: sap.ui.layout
    • Type: FIX, Description: ColumnLayout: role="form" rendered in display mode
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: Field: initial Timezone leads to error
    • Type: FIX, Description: ActionToolbarAction: implement IToolbarInteractiveControl
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.CalendarDateInterval: shows correct year
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: fix wrong aria-labelledBy id references
    • Type: FIX, Description: ObjectPageLayout: prevent endless loop in ResizeHandler callbacks

item.title: Version 1.136.16 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.136.16

  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue when discarding a draft containing a DefaultValuesFunction by destroying the created context bindings
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now support side effects in the RichTextEditorWithMetadata building block
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the application can handle the SideEffects events when an action has been executed
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where the default value for an action parameter with the decimal type did not contain quotes around "0"
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the triggerAction of SideEffects is executed using strict handling
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now support side effects in the RichTextEditorWithMetadata building block
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where duplicate filters were included in value help description requests
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: DemoKit: Hardened script loading in internal bootstrap processes for Card Explorer and Accessibility Guide applications
    • Type: FIX, Description: IllustrationExplorer: Fix unstable OPA tests for size, set, and category selects
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Text: Skip unstable test in Chrome
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where unbound actions were incorrectly displayed in table context menus
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved multiple issues with variant management and application state handling
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the current object page context is always passed as a parameter while fetching the Related Apps
  • Library: sap.ui.commons
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.commons.Tree: fix unstable test
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.core: Harden script loading in internal bootstrap scripts
  • Library: sap.ui.integration
    • Type: FIX, Description: DemoKit: Hardened script loading in internal bootstrap processes for Card Explorer and Accessibility Guide applications
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: FieldBase: fix issue when searching for string including ().
    • Type: FIX, Description: ui.Table: Column Freeze behavior and state
  • Library: sap.ui.table
    • Type: FIX, Description: ui.Table: Column Freeze behavior and state

item.title: Version 1.136.17 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.136.17

  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now correctly recreate empty rows after executing side effects
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now correctly access the environmentCapabilities service when starting an application
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now correctly access the environmentCapabilities service when starting an application
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed an issue where the image on the slide tile was disappearing on browser window resize
    • Type: FIX, Description: p13n.SelectionPanel: Fix item count
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed an issue where the slide tile content was not adjusting dynamically to the screen size
    • Type: FIX, Description: m.Table: avoid scroll jump when focus is forwarded on mouse click
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DateRangeSelection: selection via keyboard is working
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpDialog: Table header now has correct aria-level
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.test.autowaiter._timeoutWaiter: Guard log construction with level check
  • Library: sap.ui.export
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.export: Add XSRF token support for Read Access Logging
  • Library: sap.ui.generic.app
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now support fixed value list validation for combo boxes in function import dialogs
  • Library: sap.ui.richtexteditor
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.richtexteditor.RichTextEditor: aria-readonly attribute is not added to the RTE container element when the editor is in read-only mode
  • Library: sap.ui.table
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table: Show busy indicator when selection plugins load data
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DateRangeSelection: selection via keyboard is working

item.title: Version 1.136.19 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.136.19

  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where clicking Create failed after navigating back from create mode to a list report page with inline edit

item.title: Version 1.136.20 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.136.20

  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where the UI.Hidden annotation was ignored in phone and email entries in the contact quick view
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now correctly display error messages that occur during object creation
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now pass the openInNewTab property to the onBeforeNavigation hook to ensure correct navigation handling when users click 'Open in New Tab'
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where the UI.Hidden annotation was ignored in phone and email entries in the contact quick view
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table sorting now works correctly when variantManagement is set to None
  • Library: sap.fe.templates
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table sorting now works correctly when variantManagement is set to None
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where the table appeared empty after navigating back from a full-page application, caused by a race condition where data was loaded before filter values from iAppState were restored
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where table data was not restored after a browser refresh when mandatory filters were used together with additional bindings

item.title: Version 1.136.15 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.136.15

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Popover: Prevent shifting of root html element to ensure correct positioning
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: You can now remove action buttons from object page subsections in key user adaptation
    • Type: FIX, Description: The draft activation confirmation popup is no longer displayed when the navigation from an object page opens a new browser window or tab
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueListProvider: fallback to parent's bound value when control value falsy
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterBar: Empty, NotEmpty - incorrect result
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.CalendarRow: Corrected rendering of non-working periods

item.title: Version 1.142.6 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.142.6

  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that custom columns that contain numbers are correctly exported
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed a jump issue in the header container by using an outline instead of a border
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Input: resolve iPad Safari rendering issue
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/Control: Improve focus restoration for busy indicator
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.microchart
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've fixed an issue where the bar labels within the stacked bar micro chart disappears after navigating back to the main screen due to reduction in chart height
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: P13nConditionPanel: Fixed issue with fiscal formatting
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterController: DynamicDateRange can now correctly filter table
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpDialog: Numeric keys are no longer parsed
    • Type: FIX, Description: DateRangeType: Correct filtering from saved variant in P13n dialog
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpDialog: Short string keys now correctly select the corresponding row
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: OPA: Fix _promiseWaiter handling of null executors
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/Control: Improve focus restoration for busy indicator
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.RecurrenceUtils: Comparison of UTC dates.
  • Library: sap.ui.ux3
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.ux3.ThingInspector: Stabilize tests
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: ObjectPageLayout: prevent endless loop in ResizeHandler callbacks
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: fix wrong aria-labelledBy id references
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Ensure subsection visibility is tracked correctly

item.title: Version 1.142.7 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.142.7

  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the triggerAction of SideEffects is executed using strict handling
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now display inline edit for empty fields in grid tables
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where duplicate filters were included in value help description requests
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue with the visibility of subsections by setting the binding context to null or undefined
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where referenced IDs in custom columns were not passed correctly
  • Library: sap.fe.templates
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue with the visibility of subsections by setting the binding context to null or undefined
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.OverflowToolbar: onfocusfail no longer throws an error
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: Skip onfocusin filtering after suggestion item selection for MultiComboBox
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: missing token descriptions when setUiState is called after associateValueLists
  • Library: sap.ui.layout
    • Type: FIX, Description: ColumnLayout: role="form" rendered in display mode
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: ConditionType: formatting null after async formatting returns wrong value
    • Type: FIX, Description: Field: initial Timezone leads to error

item.title: Version 1.142.8 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.142.8

  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now support side effects in the RichTextEditorWithMetadata building block
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the application can handle the SideEffects events when an action has been executed
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where the default value for an action parameter with the decimal type did not contain quotes around "0"
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue when discarding a draft containing a DefaultValuesFunction by destroying the created context bindings
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now support side effects in the RichTextEditorWithMetadata building block
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Popover: Prevent shifting of root html element to ensure correct positioning
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue on the analytical list page where navigation failed after selecting a value from value help and pressing Enter
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterBar: Empty, NotEmpty - incorrect result

item.title: Version 1.142.9 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.142.9

  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now correctly recreate empty rows after executing side effects
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now correctly access the environmentCapabilities service when starting an application
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now correctly access the environmentCapabilities service when starting an application
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: IllustrationExplorer: Fix unstable OPA tests for size, set, and checkbox actions
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Text: Skip unstable test in Chrome
  • Library: sap.ui.commons
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.commons.Tree: fix unstable test
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.core: Harden script loading in internal bootstrap scripts
    • Type: FIX, Description: FESR: Fix excessive interaction recording on livechange events
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: FieldBase: fix issue when searching for string including ().

item.title: Version 1.142.12 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.142.12

  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now pass the openInNewTab property to the onBeforeNavigation hook to ensure correct navigation handling when users click 'Open in New Tab'
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now correctly display error messages that occur during object creation
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where analytical tables failed to load when UpdateRestrictions pointed to a navigation property
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where clicking Create failed after navigating back from create mode to a list report page with inline edit
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table sorting now works correctly when variantManagement is set to None
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now correctly sort an amount column when there are multiple currencies
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where analytical tables failed to load when UpdateRestrictions pointed to a navigation property
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where navigating back to a list report page with inline edit caused the app to terminate unexpectedly
  • Library: sap.fe.templates
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table sorting now works correctly when variantManagement is set to None

item.title: Version 1.142.11 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.142.11

  • Library: sap.gantt
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now updated the appropriate error message when gantt chart exceeds maximum printable size
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed a binding sync issue for expanding and collapsing the gantt chart while printing.

item.title: Version 1.142.4 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.142.4

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now removed redundant CSS attributes from the GenericTile header content to avoid the truncation of text in certain languages
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendarHeader: Correct reserved slot calculation
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterBar: Remove premature initialise() call to fix race condition with external SVM
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueListProvider: Correct firing of 'change' event when single text field is used with no description
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterBar: resume binding of inner controls if FilterBar disabled it
  • Library: sap.ui.export
    • Type: FIX, Description: Obtain customized date/time format pattern
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: MultiValueField: duplicate values not recognized
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.Calendar: fix unstable test

item.title: Version 1.142.10 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.142.10

  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBox: adjust failing tests in FF
    • Type: FIX, Description: ui.Table: Column Freeze behavior and state
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed an issue where the image on the slide tile was disappearing on browser window resize
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed an issue where the slide tile content was not adjusting dynamically to the screen size
    • Type: FIX, Description: DemoKit: Hardened script loading in internal bootstrap processes for Card Explorer and Accessibility Guide applications
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: The AI-assisted easy filter now correctly handles semantic date fields when applying and resetting filters
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved multiple issues with variant management and application state handling
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartField: Description not updated while field is hidden
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.core: Fix cross-browser OwnStatics test
  • Library: sap.ui.export
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.export: Add XSRF token support for Read Access Logging
  • Library: sap.ui.integration
    • Type: FIX, Description: DemoKit: Hardened script loading in internal bootstrap processes for Card Explorer and Accessibility Guide applications
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelp: Tokenizer shows empty Token
    • Type: FIX, Description: p13n.ChartItemPanel: fix acc issues
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelp: only 50 Tokens are shown
  • Library: sap.ui.table
    • Type: FIX, Description: ui.Table: Column Freeze behavior and state
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table: Show busy indicator when selection plugins load data

item.title: Version 1.145.0 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.145.0

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: Integration Card: Implement inverted object status in the Table Card
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.GridList: Align group header font size with design specification
    • Type: FIX, Description: Integration Card: Large info texts no longer gets cut off
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.SidePanel: close the opener that of the side content properly
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.SidePanel: adjust side content header reference
  • Library: sap.fe.ariba
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now store the filter mode switch and view switch in an analytical list page using variant management
  • Library: sap.fe.base
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now store the filter mode switch and view switch in an analytical list page using variant management
  • Library: sap.fe.controls
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now store the filter mode switch and view switch in an analytical list page using variant management
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We've introduced the AINotice building block to add a notice about AI-generated content
  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We've added new content aggregations and properties to the Page building block
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now include the context from the navigation entities of DataFieldWithIBN and DataFieldForIBN using their mapping annotations
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now use the isPartOfPreview attribute to show and hide custom sections on an object page
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now publicly support the ReuseComponent class to extend reuse components
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now support the AINotice building block at the object page level
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now store the filter mode switch and view switch in an analytical list page using variant management
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now suppress links and render them as texts in the value help dialog.
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now use the imageFitType property to specify how an image fits in the avatar
  • Library: sap.fe.ina
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now store the filter mode switch and view switch in an analytical list page using variant management
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We've added new content aggregations and properties to the Page building block
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now include the context from the navigation entities of DataFieldWithIBN and DataFieldForIBN using their mapping annotations
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now use the isPartOfPreview attribute to show and hide custom sections on an object page
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now store the filter mode switch and view switch in an analytical list page using variant management
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We've introduced the AINotice building block to add a notice about AI-generated content
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now suppress links and render them as texts in the value help dialog.
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now enable the save and back feature to allow users to save an object page and navigate back to the list report page
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now support the experimental methods of sap.fe.macros.table.Table and sap.fe.macros.table.TreeTable in the Table building block
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now use the imageFitType property to specify how an image fits in the avatar
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where multiple dropdown rows were created because of too many data requests
    • Type: FIX, Description: We have resolved an issue where horizontal scrollbars did not render correctly in tables after exiting full-screen mode
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that fields that share the same value help collection can have different values in action parameter dialogs
  • Library: sap.fe.navigation
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now store the filter mode switch and view switch in an analytical list page using variant management
  • Library: sap.fe.plugins.managecache
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now store the filter mode switch and view switch in an analytical list page using variant management
  • Library: sap.fe.templates
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now use the isPartOfPreview attribute to show and hide custom sections on an object page
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now support the AINotice building block at the object page level
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now store the filter mode switch and view switch in an analytical list page using variant management
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now enable the save and back feature to allow users to save an object page and navigate back to the list report page
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now set the imageFitType property for the object page avatar using UI adaptation
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now use the imageFitType property to specify how an image fits in the avatar
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the Create action works correctly when inline edit is enabled in a list report page
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: PlanningCalendar: Week numbers display is now enabled in the months view
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.SinglePlanningCalendarMonthGrid: Change in the rendering order of the moreLink
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.VariantManagement: Improve save dialog
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendar: week numbering in Week and OneMonth view are shown again.
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now removed redundant CSS attributes from the GenericTile header content to avoid the truncation of text in certain languages
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SinglePlanningCalendarMonthGrid: Fix tab chain
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.TimePicker: link is now clickable when in value state message
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MenuButton: fixed menu close by Alt + ArrowDown/ArrowUp, F4
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now updated the demokit samples to handle the preview of locally uploaded pdf files for upload set with table
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DatePicker: improve dialog toggle trough keyboard
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DateTimePicker: Fix various bugs in the control
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.RadioButton: Disabled radio buttons should be displayed as disabled only
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DynamicDateRange: set limit to inputs in Today from/to option
    • Type: FIX, Description: : sap.m.DynamicDateRange: highlight item after included option is selected
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StepInput: format value when the front number is removed (e.g .50 -> 0.50) also, allow start typing a number with the decimal separator
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Dialog: Fixed dialog header overlapping focus outline in busy state
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Token: Delete icon tooltip aligned with latest specification
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.RatingIndicator: Half icon in display only mode is properly visualised in compact mode
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DynamicDate: uses its own text for min and max validation
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Input: fire change event correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Token: Adjust token selected bottom border and focus outline
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ObjectStatus: ontap event is marked as handled
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.TimePicker: Make TimePickerMaskMode.Enforce public
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MessageItem: correct show more focus outline
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Select/TableSelectDialog: Selection is not fired when text is being selected
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: The aria-labelledby attribute is now correctly set
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiInput: Token addition is now reset on focusin
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DynamicDateRange: popup is resized when there are less
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SearchField: Revert - Prevented unnecessary reopening of suggestions
    • Type: FIX, Description: P13nPopup: Filter with error state
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Link: Press event is fired correctly on pressing SPACE
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiComboBox: After deletion next focused token is announced with correct position
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.FacetFilter: adjust facet popover autoclose behavior
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBox: clearIcon width distortion is now fixed
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Toolbar: Preserve arrow key behavior for sap.m.MultiComboBox
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiComboBox: Resetting initial value state is now fixed
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MessageStrip: apply CSS classes correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: tokenizer is no more focusable in disabled state
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiComboBox: change event is now fired correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed an issue where the slide tile content was not adjusting dynamically to the screen size
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now display placeholder text while renaming a file on the UploadSetItem
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m Tokenizer: Ensure role "listbox" is applied to the correct container
    • Type: FIX, Description: VariantManagement: Readjust order of destruction and creation of role contexts
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MenuButton: open menu with correct button combination
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: align mobile dialog cancel button placement
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DynamicDateRange: improve grouping announcements for screen readers
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Link: enable context menu on iOS long press
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ObjectStatus: Remove deprecated API usage
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: fix border color and background for token displayOnly and non-editable state
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SearchField: Prevented unnecessary reopening of suggestions
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.commons
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now support horizontal and vertical rendering with component arrangement in the dependency layout of the network graph
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We've now introduced nodePorts and showCreateConnectionButton properties at node level for the network graph
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: You can now remove action buttons from object page subsections in key user adaptation
    • Type: FIX, Description: The Configure dialog in key user adaptation now informs users to reload the application for changes to take effect
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where placeholders were displayed instead of table column labels in popup messages
    • Type: FIX, Description: Missing behavior files no longer cause an HTTP status code 404 (Not Found) error when loading canvas pages
    • Type: FIX, Description: The draft activation confirmation popup is no longer displayed when the navigation from an object page opens a new browser window or tab
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.microchart
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now updated the value truncation digit to 5 for the harvey ball micro chart and the value varies between languages
  • Library: sap.tnt
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.tnt.NavigationListItem: Icon rendering for child items is now fixed
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.tnt.ToolPage: Side Navigation now auto-closes on item selection for small screens
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.tnt.NavigationList: Bugs reported from designers review are now fixed
  • Library: sap.ui.commons
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.commons.Tree: fix unstable test
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: FilterBar/SmartFilterBar Revert: 'Go' button aria-description is now added
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: FilterBar/SmartFilterBar: 'Go' button aria-description is now added
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: FilterBar/SmartFilterBar: Field sequence preservation and filter change handling is now improved
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: SmartField: Dynamic height for multi-line fields in SmartTable is now enabled
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterBar: Remove premature initialise() call to fix race condition with external SVM
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartChart: chart type button is now disabled when no available chart types
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterBar: resume binding of inner controls if FilterBar disabled it
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar unstable date related tests fixed
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueListProvider: Correct firing of 'change' event when single text field is used with no description
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: Suggestion selections are now handled correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpDialog: Table header now has correct aria-level
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpDialog: Table is now properly aligned
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpDialog: column sort is now respected from SmartTable
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartField handles TextArrangement DescriptionOnly correctly
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StepInput: format value when the front number is removed (e.g .50 -> 0.50) also, allow start typing a number with the decimal separator
    • Type: FIX, Description: jquery/Focusable: extend traversing with shadow DOM
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Select/TableSelectDialog: Selection is not fired when text is being selected
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/test/starter: Adjust type definitions of Test Starter Suite Configuration to be aligned with Test Starter logic
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.core.ShortcutHintsMixin: Hide shortcut hint on mouseout
    • Type: FIX, Description: Diagnostics: Vertical scrolling issue is now resolved
  • Library: sap.ui.documentation
    • Type: FIX, Description: DemoKit: Clean up event listeners in controller lifecycle
    • Type: FIX, Description: Demo Kit: Position deprecated info below title in API Reference
  • Library: sap.ui.export
    • Type: FIX, Description: Obtain customized date/time format pattern
  • Library: sap.ui.fl
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.VariantManagement: Improve save dialog
  • Library: sap.ui.integration
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: Integration Card: Implement inverted object status in the Table Card
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Select/TableSelectDialog: Selection is not fired when text is being selected
    • Type: FIX, Description: Integration Card: Large info texts no longer gets cut off
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.integration.widgets.Card: Fixed error when setting card manifest to null
    • Type: FIX, Description: Integration Cards: Fix reported console errors in Card Explorer
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.ui.mdc.valueHelp: Remove duplicate label from DefineConditionsPanel
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: MDC.Chart: experimental flag is now removed
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.VariantManagement: Improve save dialog
    • Type: FIX, Description: Field: runtime error if DOM removed while update
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now updated the demokit samples to handle the preview of locally uploaded pdf files for upload set with table
    • Type: FIX, Description: MultiValueField: duplicate values not recognized
    • Type: FIX, Description: MDC.Chart: chart type button is now disabled when no available chart types
    • Type: FIX, Description: Adapt Filters Panel does not open
    • Type: FIX, Description: Validation Issue in TableSettingsDialog
    • Type: FIX, Description: P13nPopup: Filter with error state
    • Type: FIX, Description: mdc.FilterBar: clear filter item changes on variant switch
  • Library: sap.ui.richtexteditor
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.richtexteditor: Add missing status when setting value in TinyMCE
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.richtexteditor: Ensure setValue is applied during TinyMCE initialization
  • Library: sap.ui.table
    • Type: FIX, Description: MultiSelectionPlugin: Correctly enable header selector when used in AnalyticalTable
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: PlanningCalendar: Week numbers display is now enabled in the months view
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendar: week numbering in Week and OneMonth view are shown again.
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.CalendarDateInterval sap.ui.unified.CalendarTimeInterval: week numbers display in calendar interval controls is visible again
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DateTimePicker: Fix various bugs in the control
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.CalendarRow: skip appointments without start date
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.Calendar: fixed focus in Horizon HC themes
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.FileUploader: Add visible label to the uploader input
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.FileUploader: update value help icon as per spec
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.FileUploader: Clear file selection when invisible
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uiunified.Calendar: visual fixes for HC themes/base/Calendar
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.uinifed.calendar.DatesRow: adjust day names describedby references
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.FileUploader: button only type aligned correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.CalendarRow: Corrected rendering of non-working periods
  • Library: sap.ui.ux3
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.ux3.ThingInspector: Stabilize tests

    • Type: FIX, Description: Classic Homepage: Display Tile content after adding
