item.title: Version 1.145.1 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.145.1

  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now support side effects in the RichTextEditorWithMetadata building block
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the application can handle the SideEffects events when an action has been executed
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where the default value for an action parameter with the decimal type did not contain quotes around "0"
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the triggerAction of SideEffects is executed using strict handling
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now correctly apply the defaultCreationMode manifest setting to the Table building block
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now support side effects in the RichTextEditorWithMetadata building block
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now display inline edit for empty fields in grid tables
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where duplicate filters were included in value help description requests
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue with the visibility of subsections by setting the binding context to null or undefined
  • Library: sap.fe.templates
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue with the visibility of subsections by setting the binding context to null or undefined
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: Keep n-more popover open on item delete
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StepInput: change event when value is not with correct precision is thrown now.
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed a jump issue in the header container by using an outline instead of a border
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.OverflowToolbar: onfocusfail no longer throws an error
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.core.delegate.ScrollEnablement: prevent TypeError on null offsetParent
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/Control: Improve focus restoration for busy indicator
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved multiple issues with variant management and application state handling
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.microchart
    • Type: FIX, Description: InteractiveDonutChart: correction of fill color
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've fixed an issue where the bar labels within the stacked bar micro chart disappears after navigating back to the main screen due to reduction in chart height
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: Skip onfocusin filtering after suggestion item selection for MultiComboBox
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: missing token descriptions when setUiState is called after associateValueLists
    • Type: FIX, Description: P13nConditionPanel: Fixed issue with fiscal formatting
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpDialog: Numeric keys are no longer parsed
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterController: DynamicDateRange can now correctly filter table
    • Type: FIX, Description: DateRangeType: Correct filtering from saved variant in P13n dialog
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpDialog: Short string keys now correctly select the corresponding row
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StepInput: change event when value is not with correct precision is thrown now.
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.core.delegate.ScrollEnablement: prevent TypeError on null offsetParent
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/Control: Improve focus restoration for busy indicator
  • Library: sap.ui.layout
    • Type: FIX, Description: ColumnLayout: role="form" rendered in display mode
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterBar: Empty, NotEmpty - incorrect result
    • Type: FIX, Description: ConditionType: formatting null after async formatting returns wrong value
    • Type: FIX, Description: Field: initial Timezone leads to error
  • Library: sap.ui.table
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table: Correctly update selected and enabled state of the SelectAll checkbox
    • Type: FIX, Description: rowmodes.Auto: Automatic row count adjustment
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.RecurrenceUtils: Comparison of UTC dates.
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: ObjectPageLayout: prevent endless loop in ResizeHandler callbacks

item.title: Version 1.145.2 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.145.2

  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now correctly recreate empty rows after executing side effects
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now correctly access the environmentCapabilities service when starting an application
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now correctly access the environmentCapabilities service when starting an application
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: FESR: Fix excessive interaction recording on livechange events

item.title: Version 1.145.3 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.145.3

  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where navigating back to a list report page with inline edit caused the app to terminate unexpectedly
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed an issue where the image on the slide tile was disappearing on browser window resize
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StandardDynamicDateOption: Fix default value for TODAYFROMTO operator
    • Type: FIX, Description: DemoKit: Hardened script loading in internal bootstrap processes for Card Explorer and Accessibility Guide applications
    • Type: FIX, Description: IllustrationExplorer: Fix unstable OPA tests for size, set, and checkbox actions
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Text: Skip unstable test in Chrome
  • Library: sap.ui.export
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.export: Add XSRF token support for Read Access Logging
  • Library: sap.ui.integration
    • Type: FIX, Description: DemoKit: Hardened script loading in internal bootstrap processes for Card Explorer and Accessibility Guide applications
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelp: only 50 Tokens are shown
    • Type: FIX, Description: FieldBase: fix issue when searching for string including ().
  • Library: sap.ui.table
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table: Show busy indicator when selection plugins load data

item.title: Version 1.146.0 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.146.0

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.f.SidePanel: Add title aggregation to SidePanelItem
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.AvatarGroup: Improve Individual type layout and focus styling
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.CardHeader: Updated the precision of the data timestamp
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.AvatarGroup: Focus visual spec alignment for group avatars
  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: New setting 'enableEnlargeImage' to enable lightbox for avatar
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now enable and disable the showShareInWorkzone property in the manifest.json file
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now enable and disable the shareAsTile property in the manifest.json file
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that custom columns that contain numbers are correctly exported
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: New setting 'enableEnlargeImage' to enable lightbox for avatar
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now enable and disable the showShareInWorkzone property in the manifest.json file
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We no longer use a menu button but now display the ‘Save and Back’ button separately next to the ‘Save’ button
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now enable and disable the shareAsTile property in the manifest.json file
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue with the visibility of subsections by setting the binding context to null or undefined
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that custom columns that contain numbers are correctly exported
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue with the loading of object pages by using the requestValue method
  • Library: sap.fe.templates
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: New setting 'enableEnlargeImage' to enable lightbox for avatar
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We no longer use a menu button but now display the ‘Save and Back’ button separately next to the ‘Save’ button
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue with the visibility of subsections by setting the binding context to null or undefined
  • Library: sap.gantt
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We've now introduced the useShapeFillForGhost property to set ghost shape fill color as the original shape's fill color during drag operations
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.Dialog: Focus goes on the entire dialog when we have drag or resize
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.Carousel: Responsive layout is now enabled
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.Menu: introduce 'open' event
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.SinglePlanningCalendarGrid: Sort appointments by start date
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: Align Tokenizer mobile title with spec
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.FormattedText: added <S> tag support
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.VariantManagement: Rename shortcut description
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed a jump issue in the header container by using an outline instead of a border
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: Keep n-more popover open on item delete
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SegmentedButton: add optional chain operator to clone method
    • Type: FIX, Description: VariantManagement: variant not deleted if text changed
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.Calendar: wrong aria-describedby attribute
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MenuButton: fixed dialog displacement on mobile devices
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiInput: Tokenizer is scrolled to the end on focus
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DateRangeSelection, DatePicker: onescape works correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: p13n.SelectionPanel: fix hover buttons
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Breadcrumbs: Enable text wrapping in overflow popover
    • Type: FIX, Description: xConfig: Use property-type specific comparison for removal
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiInput: Select all (ctrl+a) now selects the input text instead of all tokens
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.TableSelectDialog: Initial focus is now set to the correct item
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Popover: The height of the control is now fixed in Safari
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed an issue in slide tile where the tile indicator buttons were not visible
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiInput: Remove duplicate cut/copy handling to fix clipboard operations
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.VariantManagement: copy items binding template into manage dialog
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MessagePopover: List view preserved after resize is now reverted
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.core.delegate.ScrollEnablement: prevent TypeError on null offsetParent
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendar: fixed focus of table rows in popin mode
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Input: resolve iPad Safari rendering issue
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.CheckBox: Fix state limitation for CheckBox
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed the width of slideTile and genericTile when they are placed inside a ushell section in sap_fiori_3 theme
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MessagePopover: List view is now preserved after resize
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.OverflowToolbar: onfocusfail no longer throws an error
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendar: week numbering in Week and OneMonth view are shown again.
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Datepicker/DateTimePicker/DateRangeSelection: align with VD specification
    • Type: FIX, Description: Popups: Default popover padding is now removed
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiComboBox: MultiComboBox does not throw errors onAfterClose
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/Control: Improve focus restoration for busy indicator
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DynamicDateRange: resize the popup depending on page
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StepInput: adapt to VD specs on mobile
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.commons
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We've now added a focusChange event when the focus is removed from the input field in CalculationBuilder
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now provide the preferredAction startup parameter to automatically trigger the SmartSummary action on the object page
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: When using key user adaptation on the object page, the Configure Table dialog now only displays create mode options specific for each table variant
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now show an illustrated message if there is no data in a chart
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where an invalid application state during navigation caused errors when interacting with SAP Fiori launchpad
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where column personalization settings were applied to incorrect columns in a draft-enabled grid table due to the Edit Status column not being calculated into the column index
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.microchart
    • Type: FIX, Description: InteractiveDonutChart: correction of fill color
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've fixed an issue where the bar labels within the stacked bar micro chart disappears after navigating back to the main screen due to reduction in chart height
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now updated the value truncation digit to 5 for the harvey ball micro chart and the value varies between languages
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: FilterBar/SmartFilterBar: 'Go' button aria-description is now added
    • Type: FIX, Description: personalization/Controller: Store normalized data in alreadyKnownRuntimeData
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartChart: SmartLinks from details button now work correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpDialog: Numeric keys are no longer parsed
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterController: DynamicDateRange can now correctly filter table
    • Type: FIX, Description: DateRangeType: Correct filtering from saved variant in P13n dialog
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpDialog: Short string keys now correctly select the corresponding row
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: Bound Filters support tree bindings
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: Bound Filters support filter API
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: OPA: keyDown and keyUp events to Press action are introduced
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: Bound Filters for List Bindings
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.test.autoWaiter: test fixed to use specific waiter API
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.base.strings.formatMessage: Accept nullish arguments
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.test.RecordReplay: Improved selector for disabled controls
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Popover: The height of the control is now fixed in Safari
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.core.delegate.ScrollEnablement: prevent TypeError on null offsetParent
    • Type: FIX, Description: jquery/isHidden: treat display:contents elements as visible
    • Type: FIX, Description: Popups: Default popover padding is now removed
    • Type: FIX, Description: core/Control: Improve focus restoration for busy indicator
  • Library: sap.ui.documentation
    • Type: FIX, Description: DemoKit: Missing inherited properties of typedefs are now visible
  • Library: sap.ui.fl
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.ui.fl: Enable Context Based Adaptation in CF
  • Library: sap.ui.integration
    • Type: FIX, Description: Integration Cards: DateRange filter now handles empty values correctly in the writeValueToConfiguration method
    • Type: FIX, Description: Integration Cards: When data is refreshed, blocking msg is removed
    • Type: FIX, Description: Card schema: Missing RBG definition is now available
    • Type: FIX, Description: Integration Cards: CardExtension tests no longer open a new tab
    • Type: FIX, Description: Integration Cards: Min-width for the Object card is now changed
  • Library: sap.ui.layout
    • Type: FIX, Description: ColumnLayout: role="form" rendered in display mode
    • Type: FIX, Description: Form: control below Label in display mode
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: : Add unit test for ariaLabelledBy in DefineConditionsPanel
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table: sorter and grouping not applied
    • Type: FIX, Description: Fix addCustomView Functionality
    • Type: FIX, Description: Field: runtime error if DOM removed while update
  • Library: sap.ui.richtexteditor
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.richtexteditor.RichTextEditor: Content area theming applied correctly
  • Library: sap.ui.table
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: ui.Table: Implemented momentum scrolling
    • Type: FIX, Description: rowmodes.Auto: Automatic row count adjustment
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.Calendar: wrong aria-describedby attribute
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.RecurrenceUtils: Comparison of UTC dates.
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendar: week numbering in Week and OneMonth view are shown again.
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.CalendarDateInterval sap.ui.unified.CalendarTimeInterval: week numbers display in calendar interval controls is visible again
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.FileUploader: changes to the enum values of the property "httpRequestMethod"
  • Library: sap.ui.vk
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: Cross section outline and settings
    • Type: FIX, Description: Viewer.html layout broken
    • Type: FIX, Description: fix: z near calculation issue
    • Type: FIX, Description: Callout size issue when showPaperFrame is enabled and output settings are invalid
    • Type: FIX, Description: DrawerToolbar: setViewInfo does not set cross section button
  • Library: sap.ushell
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: Provide successor APIs for dirty state handling
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ushell.services.Extension: TypeScript type corrected
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ushell.services.FrameBoundExtension.Footer: aria-hidden handling corrected
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ushell.components.shell.Notifications: Notification quick action handling improved
    • Type: FIX, Description: Shell Controller: Enhance SAP Business Client URL with Origin
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSubSection: Aggregation binding issue fixed
    • Type: FIX, Description: ObjectPageLayout: prevent endless loop in ResizeHandler callbacks
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: fix wrong aria-labelledBy id references
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Ensure subsection visibility is tracked correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: fix back navigation to IconTabHeader
  • Library: deprecated
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.ui.integration.widgets.Card#getRuntimeUrl] replaced by {@link sap.ui.integration.widgets.Card#resolveUrl}
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.ushell.Container.DirtyState#undefined] the concept has been abandoned.
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.ushell.Container#attachRendererCreatedEvent] the concept has been abandoned.
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.ushell.Container#deregisterDirtyStateProvider] replaced by {@link sap.ushell.navigation.DirtyState#deregisterDirtyStateProvider}.
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.ushell.Container#detachRendererCreatedEvent] the concept has been abandoned.
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.ushell.Container#registerDirtyStateProvider] replaced by {@link sap.ushell.navigation.DirtyState#registerDirtyStateProvider}.
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.ushell.Container#setDirtyFlag] replaced by {@link sap.ushell.navigation.DirtyState#setDirtyFlag}.

item.title: Version 1.147.0 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.147.0

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: Integration Cards: Added customSettings for Mobile SDK
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: Integration Cards: Pop-in behavior for Table Card columns is now available
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.f.DynamicPage: New experimental event breakpointChanged
    • Type: FIX, Description: Integration cards: Microchart is now visible when mainIndicator is absent
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPageHeader: root element is now focusable on click
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.FlexibleColumnLayout: Update sample
  • Library: sap.fe.controls
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now support the AI notice at the column level
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now display inline edit for empty fields in grid tables
  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now request additional properties at the page or table level in the manifest.json file
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now support the AI notice at the column level
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now use an emphasized button for any annotation-based or custom action in the header or footer of the page
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now restrict key user adaptation in forms and sections using the designtime property
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now correctly access the environmentCapabilities service when starting an application
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now support side effects in the RichTextEditorWithMetadata building block
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the application can handle the SideEffects events when an action has been executed
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where the default value for an action parameter with the decimal type did not contain quotes around "0"
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the triggerAction of SideEffects is executed using strict handling
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now use the multi-input field in the value help dialog
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now request additional properties at the page or table level in the manifest.json file
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We've introduced the AlwaysEditableField building block to specify a field as always editable
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now support the AI notice at the column level
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now use an emphasized button for any annotation-based or custom action in the header or footer of the page
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We've replaced the fixed FlexBox split with a ResponsiveSplitter layout
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now restrict key user adaptation in forms and sections using the designtime property
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now correctly include the DATERANGE operator in the conditions for the setFilterValues API
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now correctly access the environmentCapabilities service when starting an application
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now correctly apply the defaultCreationMode manifest setting to the Table building block
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now support side effects in the RichTextEditorWithMetadata building block
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that IsActiveEntity filters are correctly removed from draft chart queries
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now display inline edit for empty fields in grid tables
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where duplicate filters were included in value help description requests
  • Library: sap.fe.templates
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now request additional properties at the page or table level in the manifest.json file
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now use an emphasized button for any annotation-based or custom action in the header or footer of the page
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now restrict key user adaptation in forms and sections using the designtime property
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.Switch: readonly mode
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendar: startDateChange is fired after updating
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.TimePicker: Preserve raw input when formatting fails in TimePicker
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MenuButton: Sets 'button' type to the internal buttons
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now added InvisibleMessage for screen reader navigation announcements in upload set with table
    • Type: FIX, Description: Added InvisibleMessage for screen reader navigation announcements
    • Type: FIX, Description: Added InvisibleMessage for screen reader navigation announcements
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ViewSettingsDialog: Search field aria-labelledby
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: Fix unstable qUnit tests
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendar: render week numbers for custom view keys
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: Prevent tap event propagation to parent controls
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.LightBox: Focus is restored after image loading error
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Menu: focus parent menu item on F2 in EndContent
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendarHeader: has aria-labelledby for the views
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MessageView: SegmentedButton icons color adjusted when active
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.RadioButton: Disabled and Read-only radio buttons are now displayed as disabled only
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiInput: Remove focus outline of the control when focus goes to a token
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.RadioButton: Documentation for 'select' event parameter is updated
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Link: fixed error message in icon and endIcon setters
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Select: Update sample
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.OverflowToolbar: Update sample
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Link: fixed endIcon reset/clear
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: Fix unstable qUnit test
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiComboBox: qUnit test is now fixed for v2.x build
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StepInput: change event is fired when the value is changed and the precision isn't correct
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiComboBox: qUnit test is now fixed for v2.x build
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.semantic.DetailPage: getAggregation returns null for unset aggregations
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Toolbar: Update sample
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DynamicDateRange: has correct tooltip for date/time options
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DynamicDateRange: align height to content
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ObjectListItem: invisible markers are not added to ARIA
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Image: inlineSVG mode now scopes IDs to prevent duplicates
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that ActionTile avoids the default link behaviour when the action buttons are clicked
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ObjectMarker: focus of icon only marker is correct now
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiInput: focus is now kept when icons are pressed
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendar: remove redundant labelled by reference
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ProgressIndicator: Improve sample
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.OverfloToolbar: Sample update
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Avatar: Suppress warnings for empty initials
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StepInput: formatting is improved.
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiInput: Prevent caret movement on Esc when value is already restored
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: Tokens list items type is now 'Inactive'
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Toolbar: Update sample
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Avatar: Sample tooltip is now corrected
    • Type: FIX, Description: SelectionPanel: Don't hide selected descriptions
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DatePicker: user input is not overwritten when value is
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: Prevent focus on List dummy areas in tokens popup
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.RadioButtonGroup: useEntireWidth property behavior is fixed
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Carousel: Fixed focus management when scrollMode is set to "VisiblePages"
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.IconTabHeader: Restore focus to overflow button after changing from "start" to "end"
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now use the onListNavigationExtensionFromContextMenu extension API to enable the Open in New Tab or Window option from the context menu even when onListNavigation is implemented
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: The order of filter fields in the smart filter bar in list report page apps is now stored in the iAppState
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where export to PDF failed because 1:n navigation properties were incorrectly included in the OData request URL
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved multiple issues in the AI-assisted easy filter and the AI-assisted easy fill
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved multiple issues with variant management and app state handling
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where the insights card option wasn't shown on the object page when navigating in multi-entity-set scenarios
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where the OData request didn't include list report page fields configured for mass editing when they weren't visible as table columns
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: comp.FilterBar/SmartFilterBar: Adapt Filters dialog is now redesigned
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpDialog: single selection enhancement
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterBar: Adapt Filters now works properly when there is check box
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterBar: Filters that are hidden via ControlConfiguration are no longer visible in Adapt Filters dialog
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterBar: Adapt Filters dialog no longer clones the dependent ValueHelp of filters
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueListProvider: fallback to parent's bound value when control value falsy
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpDialog sId of ariaLabelledBy enhancement
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: Focus is stolen from the first focusable element on the page
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterBar: Label not rendered when hiddenFilter is changed from true to false
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartChart: IllustratedMessage now has correct size
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartChart: navigation after changing view now works correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: Skip onfocusin filtering after suggestion item selection for MultiComboBox
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: Backslash (\) is no longer duplicated in filter tokens when the value contains a curly brace ({)
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartField: DateTimeWithTimezone type validation
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: missing token descriptions when setUiState is called after associateValueLists
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterBar: Clear stale adapt filter items before reordering on variant switch
    • Type: FIX, Description: personalization/Controller: Store normalized data in alreadyKnownRuntimeData
    • Type: FIX, Description: P13nConditionPanel: Fixed issue with fiscal formatting
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: core/RenderManager: Add renderAndFlush() method
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: OPA: rightClick property added to Press action
    • Type: FIX, Description: src/sap.ui.core/src/sap/ui/model/Model#requestFailed: Fix JSDoc for statusCode parameter
    • Type: FIX, Description: uiloader-autoconfig: Fix ConfigurationProvider registration
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.test.matchers.Properties: prevent match failure with global RegExp
    • Type: FIX, Description: OPA5: Add viewNamespace support at page object level
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StepInput: change event is fired when the value is changed and the precision isn't correct
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.test.autoWaiter: stabilize NavigationContainerWaiter flaky tests
  • Library: sap.ui.documentation
    • Type: FIX, Description: DemoKit: Notify controls of content density change in sample iFrame
    • Type: FIX, Description: DemoKit: Button id corrected
    • Type: FIX, Description: Demo Kit: Stub external downloads in OPA tests
  • Library: sap.ui.integration
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: Integration Cards: Added customSettings for Mobile SDK
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: Integration Cards: Pop-in behavior for Table Card columns is now available
    • Type: FIX, Description: Integration cards: Microchart is now visible when mainIndicator is absent
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.integration.cards.CalendarContent: resolving legendItems is now correct
  • Library: sap.ui.layout
    • Type: FIX, Description: ColumnLayout: role="form" rendered in display mode
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: mdc.Table: Restore missing row count for the TreeTable type
    • Type: FIX, Description: FieldBase: fix issue when searching for string including ().
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterBar: Empty, NotEmpty - incorrect result
    • Type: FIX, Description: ConditionType: formatting null after async formatting returns wrong value
    • Type: FIX, Description: Field: initial Timezone leads to error
    • Type: FIX, Description: p13n.panels.AdaptFiltersPanel: Performance issues
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table: sorter and grouping not applied
  • Library: sap.ui.richtexteditor
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.richtexteditor.RichTextEditor: remove 'px' in inline styles
  • Library: sap.ui.table
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table: Correctly update selected and enabled state of the SelectAll checkbox
    • Type: FIX, Description: rowmodes.Auto: Automatic row count adjustment
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendar: render week numbers for custom view keys
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.FileUploader: all style buttons are shown correct
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.CalendarDateInterval: shows correct year
  • Library: sap.ushell
    • Type: FIX, Description: ClientsideTargetResolutionAdapter, AboutDialog: re-introduce transaction field in about dialog
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ushell.services.ShellNavigationHashChanger: Adapt to final SAPMObileStart user agent string
    • Type: FIX, Description: ushell.services.Navigation: Extract App Origin from Component Data
    • Type: FIX, Description: Remove commas from FESR values during sanitization
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ushell.components.shell.Settings.UserSettings: Dialog Heading improved
    • Type: FIX, Description: Filter out apps on unsupported devices for SearchCEP
    • Type: FIX, Description: SerchableContent blocks UI
    • Type: FIX, Description: Remove searchTerm url parameter when opening app from SearchCEPNew
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: New experimental event breakpointChanged
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSubSection: Fix RTA for blocks aggregation
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageHeader: Prevent NaN actionsWidth for invisible actions
  • Library: deprecated
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [module:sap/ui/core/ElementHooks#undefined] the concept has been discarded.
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.fe.macros.filterBar.FilterBar#undefined] Use {@link sap.fe.macros.FilterBar} instead
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.ui.core.support.usage.EventBroadcaster#undefined] the concept has been discarded.
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.ui.unified.ContentSwitcherAnimation#undefined] the concept has been discarded. API is not yet finished and might change completely

item.title: Version 1.148.0 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.148.0

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: Integration Cards: Fixed border around the chart bar
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPage: Cache scrollbar width to avoid excessive style recalculations
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPage: Fix issue with nested IconTabHeader when scrollbar is overlay
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.AvatarGroup: fix infinite re-rendering due to sub-pixel rounding
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.ShellBar: Update sample
  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now use a controller extension hook to react to event-driven side effects received using a WebSocket
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now dynamically adjust the decimal padding for currencies based on the currency codelist
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now support merging cells in responsive tables
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now correctly recreate empty rows after executing side effects
  • Library: sap.fe.ina
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now use a controller extension hook to react to event-driven side effects received using a WebSocket
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now use a controller extension hook to react to event-driven side effects received using a WebSocket
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now dynamically adjust the decimal padding for currencies based on the currency codelist
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now support merging cells in responsive tables
  • Library: sap.fe.templates
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now use a controller extension hook to react to event-driven side effects received using a WebSocket
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We now dynamically adjust the decimal padding for currencies based on the currency codelist
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.ui.mdc: Dynamic properties for MDC controls
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.MessageStrip: Inline icons in formatted text are now enabled
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.MenuButton: implement IFormContent interface
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Dialog: Revert new flex box calculation
    • Type: FIX, Description: p13n.BasePanel: Import enums correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Dialog: Fix layout when no vertical scrolling
    • Type: FIX, Description: IllustrationExplorer: Fix unstable OPA tests for size and set selects
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Dialog: Fix layout when no vertical scrolling
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendar: firstDayOfWeek is set correctly when singleSelection is off
    • Type: FIX, Description: DemoKit: Hardened script loading in internal bootstrap processes for Card Explorer and Accessibility Guide applications
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Dialog: Fixed missing header shadow
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Dialog: Header text alignement is now fixed in compact mode
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Popover: ValueStateHeader reference removed from aria-labelledby
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DateRangeSelection: selection via keyboard is working
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiComboBox: Group header is visible on opening
    • Type: FIX, Description: IllustrationExplorer: Fix unstable OPA test for deprecated illustrations
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendar: announce custom row header content
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ColorPalettePopover: update button active and hover colors
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Wizard: Accessibility test page enhancement
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Popover: Firefox now correctly detects overflow and shows the scrollbar
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed an issue where a tile is clicked on while selecting the text area inside an action tile
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Select: Fix JAWS not announcing value after enabling
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Text: Skip unstable test in Chrome
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.VariantManagement: Template binding title fallback to text
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DynamicDateRange: increase StepInput width in standard options
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: One long token visibility is now adjusted
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Text: Stabilize the failing test
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Carousel: flickering is fixed
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've fixed the valueColor border overflow in generic tile by adding overflow:hidden class to clip the border within tile boundaries
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Text: Stabilize tests
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Input: ACC sample enhancement
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SelectDialog/TableSelectDialog: Prevent focus jump on late binding
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Popover: Prevent shifting of root html element to ensure correct positioning
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Breadcrumbs: Align mobile overflow dialog with VD
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendar, SPC: header higher z-index is only
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Dialog: Fix Dialog button overflow and height calculation issues
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.TimePicker: remove redundant placeholder announcement
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.GenericTag: Update Sample
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now enable the save and back feature to allow users to save an object page and navigate back to the list report page
    • Type: FIX, Description: We’ve resolved an issue where the analytical list page flickered when users switched between views
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where the Save and Next buttons didn't work on object pages in edit mode
    • Type: FIX, Description: The context menu navigation is no longer disabled on list report pages configured with a creationEntitySet setting in the manifest.json file
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where data was not correctly restored on nested object pages when navigating back using the browser back button
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where export to PDF failed because 1:n navigation properties were incorrectly included in the OData request URL
    • Type: FIX, Description: We’ve improved the loading speed of the list report page when a record is edited directly from an object page
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where clicking Edit after a failed save on an object page repeatedly triggered the same error
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where cross-application navigation using a SmartLink passed empty semantic attribute values as filters after navigating back to a list report from an object page
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: SmartFilterBar: Add DefaultValues operation in Define Conditions
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: DefaultValues not restored on app restart with default variant
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartForm: AddGroup no longer forces the visible property
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterBar: CustomControls without enable property now work properly
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartForm: GroupElement reappears after RTA revert on bound content
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterBar: Adapt Filters now works properly when there is check box
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpDialog: single selection enhancement
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.core: Harden script loading in internal bootstrap scripts
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.core: Fix cross-browser OwnStatics test
    • Type: FIX, Description: FESR: Fix excessive interaction recording on livechange events
    • Type: FIX, Description: Component.create: Enforce async behavior of API
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap/ui/core/Component#destroy: call Component#exit before destroy manifest created artifacts
  • Library: sap.ui.documentation
    • Type: FIX, Description: DemoKit: Redundant load of TrustArc lib fixed
    • Type: FIX, Description: DemoKit: Link to openui5.org releases updated
    • Type: FIX, Description: Demo Kit: Release Notes text is now conditionally rendered for OpenUI5 and SAPUI5
  • Library: sap.ui.integration
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Dialog: Revert new flex box calculation
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Dialog: Fix layout when no vertical scrolling
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Dialog: Fix layout when no vertical scrolling
    • Type: FIX, Description: DemoKit: Hardened script loading in internal bootstrap processes for Card Explorer and Accessibility Guide applications
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.integration.CardActions: Enabled property now is applied correctly when no type is defined
    • Type: FIX, Description: Integration Cards: List items with empty icons no longer have incorrect height
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: MDCTable: TableRowActionType for the ResponsiveTable extended
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.ui.mdc: Dynamic properties for MDC controls
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelp: only 50 Tokens are shown
    • Type: FIX, Description: MultiValueField: alignment in display mode
    • Type: FIX, Description: p13n.BasePanel: Import enums correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: MultiValueField: sync Conditions with Items if update fails
    • Type: FIX, Description: AdaptFiltersPanel: Fix stableId in Adapt Filters Panel
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table, Chart: insertAction fails if simple Control is inserted
    • Type: FIX, Description: AdaptFiltersPanel: fix announcements
    • Type: FIX, Description: AdaptFiltersPanel: Scrollbar should not be visible
    • Type: FIX, Description: Adapt Filters Panel: Search Field get correct announcement
    • Type: FIX, Description: Adapt Filters Panel: reordered item get not focused after reodering
    • Type: FIX, Description: AdaptFiltersPanel: Fix high contrast issue with reordering icon
  • Library: sap.ui.table
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: MDCTable: TableRowActionType for the ResponsiveTable extended
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: ui.Table: Prevent focus change on touch move
    • Type: FIX, Description: rowmodes.Auto: Incorrect row count with multiple auto-sized tables
    • Type: FIX, Description: TreeTable: toggleOpenState event parameters
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DateRangeSelection: selection via keyboard is working
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.FileUploader: Preserve focus on clear
  • Library: sap.ui.vk
    • Type: FIX, Description: remove the logic for the height to accommodate all text, preventing the scrollbar from being useful
  • Library: sap.ushell
    • Type: FIX, Description: Container.getServiceAsync: Improved error handling
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ushell.components.shell.Settings.UserDefaults: Group header for technical default values introduced.
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ushell.services.UserRecents: Last entered search term activity logging corrected.
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ushell.components.shell.Settings.UserSettings: Dialog Heading corrected
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageLayout: Disable sticky headers in RTA mode
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSubSection: Fix error when block is externally destroyed

item.title: Version 1.148.1 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.148.1

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.GridListItem: Missing shadow on selected state added
  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where intent-based navigation used an incorrect value for fields with the TextOnly text arrangement
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where navigating back to a list report page with inline edit caused the app to terminate unexpectedly
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where intent-based navigation used an incorrect value for fields with the TextOnly text arrangement
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where intent-based navigation links in the header of an object page were incorrectly disabled
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FIX, Description: m.VariantManagement: correctly bind sharing column in manage dialog
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.TimePickerClock: Replace inline drag event attributes with addEventListener
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBox: adjust failing tests in FF
    • Type: FIX, Description: p13n.SelectionPanel: fix search field announcement
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed the scroll arrow buttons not working when a single item is larger than the HeaderContainer
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: Copy/Cut works with focused token
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed the text spillover issue for the no-data placeholder in UploadSet
    • Type: FIX, Description: ui.Table: Column Freeze behavior and state
    • Type: FIX, Description: p13n.SelectionPanel: Fix item count
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed an issue where the image on the slide tile was disappearing on browser window resize
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.VariantManagement: fix search in manage dialog with items binding
    • Type: FIX, Description: m.Table: avoid scroll jump when focus is forwarded on mouse click
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StandardDynamicDateOption: Fix default value for TODAYFROMTO operator
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SelectSegmentedButtonItem: fix circular dependency
  • Library: sap.ui.comp
    • Type: FIX, Description: FilterBar: Dynamically added filters have proper visibility
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpDialog: interval fields controls state is now handled correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: SmartFilterBar: UI adaptation for Adapt Filters now works with dropdowns
  • Library: sap.ui.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: core.BusyIndicatorUtils: Set aria-busy on correct busy section
  • Library: sap.ui.dt
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.dt.OverlayUtil: guard canBeRemovedFromAggregationOnMove against parentless elements
  • Library: sap.ui.mdc
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelpDelegate: fix updateBindingInfo call
    • Type: FIX, Description: DefineConditionPanel: aria-label for remove-button has no text
    • Type: FIX, Description: DefineConditionPanel: focus new condition on Add
    • Type: FIX, Description: p13n.AdaptFiltersPanel: fix announcement of error or warning
    • Type: FIX, Description: p13n.SelectionPanel: fix search field announcement
    • Type: FIX, Description: MultiValueField: improve keyboard interaction
    • Type: FIX, Description: Field: dropdown with no data - no announcement
    • Type: FIX, Description: ValueHelp: Tokenizer shows empty Token
    • Type: FIX, Description: table.ResponsiveTableType: Remove column when table is grouped
    • Type: FIX, Description: p13n.ChartItemPanel: fix acc issues
    • Type: FIX, Description: MultiValueField: only 10 tokens shown if "more" pressed
    • Type: FIX, Description: p13n.AdaptFiltersPanel: fix view announcement
    • Type: FIX, Description: p13n.AdaptFiltersPanel: Fix label wrapping at 320px
    • Type: FIX, Description: Field, FilterField: boolean value announed twice
  • Library: sap.ui.richtexteditor
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.richtexteditor.RichTextEditor: aria-readonly attribute is not added to the RTE container element when the editor is in read-only mode
  • Library: sap.ui.table
    • Type: FIX, Description: ui.Table: Column Freeze behavior and state
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table: Show busy indicator when selection plugins load data
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSection: Enable rename in RTA

item.title: Version 1.148.2 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.148.2

  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now ensure that the type-ahead functionality is correctly triggered after inline row creation when a message dialog is open
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now pass the openInNewTab property to the onBeforeNavigation hook to ensure correct navigation handling when users click 'Open in New Tab'
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table sorting now works correctly when variantManagement is set to None
    • Type: FIX, Description: You can now override the inputFormat of date fields for data exports from the Table building block
    • Type: FIX, Description: We’ve resolved an issue where analytical tables failed to load when UpdateRestrictions pointed to a navigation property
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now correctly display error messages that occur during object creation
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where clicking Create failed after navigating back from create mode to a list report page with inline edit
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FIX, Description: Table sorting now works correctly when variantManagement is set to None
    • Type: FIX, Description: You can now override the inputFormat of date fields for data exports from the Table building block
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where pasting data from the clipboard into a table caused columns to incorrectly shift when a measure field referenced a virtual unit of measure
    • Type: FIX, Description: We’ve resolved an issue where analytical tables failed to load when UpdateRestrictions pointed to a navigation property
    • Type: FIX, Description: We now correctly sort an amount column when there are multiple currencies
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue when pasting data into a date range field in a table by ensuring the field supports EditableDisplay
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where error messages from a failed save were lost on sub-object pages, preventing the message popover from showing the backend validation errors

item.title: Version 1.149.0 Changes
item.description:
Changes in Version 1.149.0

  • Library: sap.f
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.SidePanel: fix console error and overflow menu position
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.integration ObjectCardVisualTests: enabled actionless buttons
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPageHeader: Fix pin button tooltip in pinned state
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.f.DynamicPage: Inline CSS limited
  • Library: sap.fe.controls
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We've enhanced EasyFillDialog with list items support
  • Library: sap.fe.core
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We've optimized the use of sideEffects when executing actions on multiple rows
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now define formatOptions for all fields of a column in the Table building block
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now set up navigation to a specific section of an object page
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where clicking Create failed after navigating back from create mode to a list report page with inline edit
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where intent-based navigation used an incorrect value for fields with the TextOnly text arrangement
  • Library: sap.fe.macros
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now display and remove a custom message strip on a list report page
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We've optimized the use of sideEffects when executing actions on multiple rows
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now define formatOptions for all fields of a column in the Table building block
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: We've enhanced EasyFillDialog with list items support
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now set up navigation to a specific section of an object page
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where navigating back to a list report page with inline edit caused the app to terminate unexpectedly
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where intent-based navigation used an incorrect value for fields with the TextOnly text arrangement
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where intent-based navigation links in the header of an object page were incorrectly disabled
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where the properties set on the FilterField caused validation errors
  • Library: sap.fe.templates
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now display and remove a custom message strip on a list report page
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: You can now set up navigation to a specific section of an object page
  • Library: sap.m
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.Panel: Arrow icon is now animated
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.Menu: enhance keyboard navigation and SR announcements
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.Menu: enhance keyboard navigation and SR announcements
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.Menu: enhance keyboard navigation and SR announcements
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.MaskInput: accessibility is enhanced
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.Panel: Focus for Scrollable Content Area
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: ESC now deselects all tokens
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.m.Button: long tap does not fire 'press' event anymore
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Bar: Restore selector specificity
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PullToRefresh: Improve sample
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed an issue where the image on the slide tile was disappearing on browser window resize
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Avatar: prevent focus outline clipping in overflow containers
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StandardDynamicDateOption: Fix default value for TODAYFROMTO operator
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ScrollEnablement: fix unstable test
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SegmentedButton: fix doubled SR announcement
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.VariantManagement: fix search in manage dialog with items binding
    • Type: FIX, Description: m.Table: avoid scroll jump when focus is forwarded on mouse click
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ColorPalette: pressing tab fire selectColor only when color palette is in popover
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.TabStripItem: renders icon tooltip
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Objectidentifier: order of the values in the assiciation AriaLabelledBy is correct now
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ViewSettingsDialog: remove MessageToast from acc sample
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MultiComboBox: Invalid values are now cleared on focusout
    • Type: FIX, Description: p13n.SelectionPanel: Fix item count
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBox: fix unstable tests
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Tokenizer: Copy/Cut works with focused token
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DatePicker: Labels are properly referred to DatePickers
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.StepInput: increase / decrease buttons have tooltips
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.LightBox: Focus escaping is fixed
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.QuickView: Removed staled ids from QuickView
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ComboBox: fix unstable tests for Firefox
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Panel: Visual tests adjusted
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.SelectSegmentedButtonItem: fix circular dependency
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Input: Reset value help request flag on user input
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.DynamicDateRange: content is not cut with text spacing
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.MenuButton: text for the keyboard hint is correct now
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Menu: fix visual test
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.TabStrip, sap.m.TabContainer: close button icon is aligned
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ObjectStatus: inverted status in Table is shown correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.OverflowToolbar: Compact mode styles not applied to overflow popover
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ObjectStatus: fires press in Virtual Cursor Mode
    • Type: FIX, Description: ui.Table: Column Freeze behavior and state
    • Type: FIX, Description: p13n.SelectionPanel: Filter count not correct
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.ViewSettingsDialog: update selections after reset event
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Dialog: Revert new flex box calculation
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed the title text clipping inside editable forms by increasing CSS specificity of the GenericTile's line-height rule to avoid an override by form theme styles
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.Dialog: Fix layout when no vertical scrolling
    • Type: FIX, Description: p13n.BasePanel: Import enums correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: IllustrationExplorer: Fix unstable OPA tests for size and set selects
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed an issue of incorrect heading level added on the UploadSetwithTable FilePreviewDialog
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.generic.template
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: Required field validation in inline creation rows now fires only when focus moves away from the row, not each time the user tabs between cells within the same row
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where copy, edit, or delete actions failed with an error after discarding a draft on the object page
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where cells hidden using the UI.Hidden annotation became visible after changing the table column layout
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where browser refresh didn't restore table data on list report pages configured with mandatory filters and additional bindings
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where error messages from a failed save were lost on sub-object pages, preventing the message popover from showing the backend validation errors
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've resolved an issue where navigating back from a full-page application displayed an empty table due to search queries executing before saved filter values were restored
  • Library: sap.suite.ui.microchart
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now introduced the XSWidth boolean property that applies revised XS size dimensions to improve legibility of long numeric labels in the HarveyBallMicroChart.
    • Type: FIX, Description: We've now fixed the accessibility issue of radialMicroChart control
  • Library: sap.tnt
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.tnt.NavigationListItem: Tag feature is now available

    • Type: FIX, Description: ui.Table: Column Freeze behavior and state
  • Library: sap.ui.unified
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified: Update @since tags for new recurrence types
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.m.PlanningCalendar: appointment title position in aria-labelledby is ordered correctly
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.CalendarTimeInterval: header buttons have correct accessibility attributes
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.FileUploader: acc sample with Error Value State is enhanced.
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.Calendar: fix keyboard interaction visual test
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.ui.unified.FileUploader: fix min/max widths of the control
  • Library: sap.ui.vk
    • Type: FIX, Description: add scrolling event to the text div
    • Type: FIX, Description: Clamp LOCK_TOVIEWPORT billboard size and position to viewport bounds
  • Library: sap.ushell
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: Better Error Handling for App Runtime - Initial Loading
    • Type: FIX, Description: Sandbox2: Enable manifest first
    • Type: FIX, Description: SearchLoader: Guard Clause to prevent dialog reopen on phone
    • Type: FIX, Description: Forward Navigation not detected as back navigation on Error
    • Type: FIX, Description: Delayed Shell Extensions when statistics enabled
    • Type: FIX, Description: Container: Cache services by service name instead of module path
  • Library: sap.uxap
    • Type: FEATURE, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSection: Add "Add IFrame" action for subsections in RTA
    • Type: FIX, Description: sap.uxap.ObjectPageSection: Enable rename in RTA
  • Library: deprecated
    • Type: DEPRECATED, Description: [sap.m.ActionSheet#undefined] use sap.m.Menu / sap.m.MenuItem instead.
